title: Market Data Provider Bring-Up

network_free_preflight.config_loader_credential_detection: confirmed absent for all three live providers

request_plan.reason: ProviderFactory.create() requires config.enabled and a configured credential before a provider instance can be registered with ProviderValidationRunner; disabled/uncredentialed providers cannot reach the planning stage

providers.likely_cause: ASA_TRADIER_ACCESS_TOKEN is not set in the authorized worker environment; provider config.enabled is False
providers.recommended_Founder_action: Supply ASA_TRADIER_ACCESS_TOKEN (and ASA_TRADIER_ENV if not sandbox) in the authorized environment, then re-run this validation

providers.likely_cause: ASA_FINNHUB_API_KEY is not set in the authorized worker environment; provider config.enabled is False
providers.recommended_Founder_action: Supply ASA_FINNHUB_API_KEY in the authorized environment, then re-run this validation, prioritizing the daily-candle diagnostic sequence from the runbook

providers.likely_cause: ASA_ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY is not set in the authorized worker environment; provider config.enabled is False
providers.recommended_Founder_action: Supply ASA_ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY in the authorized environment, then re-run this validation, watching rate-limit detection on the first bounded call

deterministic_fixture_provider.note: offline-only; not a substitute for live provider validation; exercised via tests/market_data (network-free)

overall_success_rationale: All three configured live providers produced a documented configuration_issue with precise, secret-free evidence; no secrets were exposed; no unbounded or live requests were made; no additional implementation work was started
